calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2023 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Fantex, Inc.?S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-12-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default prove-up hearing.

Dept. 514; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Bailiff: Deputies Choi & Park; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:25:51 a.m., pausing at 09:27:58 a.m., reconvening at 09:48:42 a.m., pausing at 10:01:40 a.m., reconvening at 10:06:01 a.m., and concluding at 10:10:35 a.m.

Plaintiff Fantex, Inc. represented by Bruce B. Kelson, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Terrance Williams not appearing.

TED MONOHON is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case, an offer of proof, and addresses venue.
TED MONOHON is examined by the Court.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit A - Fantex Brand Agreement
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. B - Fantex, Inc. Invoice dated Dec-06-2017
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. C - Fantex, Inc. Invoice dates Oct-15-2018
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. D - Wire Transfer

Based on the documents filed, review of the contract, the statement made by Plaintiff's witness and its Counsel, consideration, Court finds Defendant has breached the contract responsibilities.

Court is prepared to award pre-judgment interest at 5% from Dec-30-2019 through Jan-12-2023.
Counsel calculates pre-judgment interest.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Fantex, Inc. and against Defendant Terrance Williams. as follows:

Damages: $198,944.71
Prejudgment Interest: $30,000.00
Attorney Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $912.25

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $232,681.96
Proposed judgment signed as modified.
